name: air-freight-quotation-system
description: Production unified React + Express + SQLite setup for Air Freight Quotation Management System

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend --include=dev
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev:backend'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev:frontend'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
